betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Spark Singularity§f is a controlled spatial anomaly for §badvanced power generation§f.

§eCapabilities:§f
• End-game power source with incredible output
• Uses exotic physics for energy generation
• One of the most powerful energy sources in the mod

§eConstruction:§f
• Requires §bDineutronium§f components
• §bSpark§f materials needed
• Extremely resource-intensive

§c§4CONTAINMENT WARNING:§f
Containment failure is §ccatastrophic§f. Ensure stable power and cooling before operation.

§aTip:§f This represents the peak of end-game power generation. Required for the most demanding machinery.
